sentences.target: Ich räume das Wohnzimmer heute schnell auf.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʁɔɪ̯mə das ˈvoːnˌtsɪmɐ ˈhɔɪ̯tə ʃnɛl aʊ̯f/

translations.de: Ich räume das Wohnzimmer heute schnell auf.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʁɔɪ̯mə das ˈvoːnˌtsɪmɐ ˈhɔɪ̯tə ʃnɛl aʊ̯f/
translations.en: I'm tidying up the living room quickly today.
translations.es: Hoy voy a recoger la sala rápido.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je range vite le salon.
translations.it: Oggi metto a posto il soggiorno in fretta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天要把客厅赶紧收拾一下。
translations.yue: 我今日要快啲執下客廳。
translations.ru: Сегодня я быстро приберусь в гостиной.
translations.pt: Hoje vou arrumar a sala rápido.
translations.he: היום אני מסדר את הסלון מהר.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi dọn phòng khách cho nhanh.
translations.nl: Vandaag ruim ik de woonkamer snel op.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я швидко приберу у вітальні.
translations.hu: Ma gyorsan rendet rakok a nappaliban.
translations.hi: आज मैं लिविंग रूम जल्दी से समेट रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag rydder jeg stua fort.
translations.id: Hari ini aku cepat-cepat membereskan ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Idag plockar jag undan i vardagsrummet snabbt.
translations.ro: Astăzi fac ordine rapid în sufragerie.
translations.da: I dag rydder jeg hurtigt op i stuen.
translations.ja: 今日はリビングを手早く片付けます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; clausal subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present; separable verb; head of the predicate; linked to particle 'auf' via compound_id.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular; determiner introducing the direct object.
Common noun; neuter; direct object (accusative) of 'räume'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb/clause, indicating time.
Manner adverb; modifies the verb, indicating speed.
Separable verbal particle; completes the meaning of 'räume' → 'aufräumen'; clause-final; linked via compound_id.

sentences.target: Das Wohnzimmer ist klein und gemütlich.

translations.de: Das Wohnzimmer ist klein und gemütlich.
translations.en: The living room is small and cozy.
translations.es: La sala es pequeña y acogedora.
translations.fr: Le salon est petit et chaleureux.
translations.it: Il soggiorno è piccolo e accogliente.
translations.pt: A sala é pequena e aconchegante.
translations.vi: Phòng khách nhỏ và ấm cúng.
translations.nl: De woonkamer is klein en gezellig.
translations.hi: लिविंग रूम छोटा और आरामदायक है.
translations.el: Το σαλόνι είναι μικρό και ζεστό.
translations.ja: リビングは小さくて居心地がいいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative neuter singular; determiner for the subject noun.
Common noun; neuter; subject of the copula.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links the subject with predicative complements.
Predicative adjective; complement of 'ist'.
Coordinating conjunction; connects two predicative adjectives.
Predicative adjective; complement of 'ist'.

sentences.target: Wir essen Pizza im Wohnzimmer vor dem Fernseher.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɛsən ˈpɪt͡sa ɪm ˈvoːnˌtsɪmɐ foːɐ̯ deːm ˈfɛʁnzeːɐ̯/

translations.de: Wir essen Pizza im Wohnzimmer vor dem Fernseher.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɛsən ˈpɪt͡sa ɪm ˈvoːnˌtsɪmɐ foːɐ̯ deːm ˈfɛʁnzeːɐ̯/
translations.en: We're eating pizza in the living room, in front of the TV.
translations.es: Estamos comiendo pizza en la sala, frente al televisor.
translations.fr: On mange une pizza dans le salon, devant la télé.
translations.it: Stiamo mangiando la pizza in soggiorno, davanti alla TV.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在客厅里对着电视吃披萨。
translations.yue: 我哋喺客廳對住電視食薄餅。
translations.ru: Мы едим пиццу в гостиной перед телевизором.
translations.pt: Estamos comendo pizza na sala, em frente à TV.
translations.he: אנחנו אוכלים פיצה בסלון מול הטלוויזיה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ăn pizza trong phòng khách, trước tivi.
translations.ar: نحن نأكل بيتزا في غرفة الجلوس أمام التلفاز.
translations.nl: We eten pizza in de woonkamer, voor de tv.
translations.uk: Ми їмо піцу у вітальні перед телевізором.
translations.hu: A nappaliban a tévé előtt pizzát eszünk.
translations.hi: हम लिविंग रूम में टीवी के सामने पिज़्ज़ा खा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Jemy pizzę w salonie, przed telewizorem.
translations.el: Τρώμε πίτσα στο σαλόνι, μπροστά στην τηλεόραση.
translations.nb: Vi spiser pizza i stua, foran TV-en.
translations.id: Kami makan pizza di ruang tamu, di depan TV.
translations.sv: Vi äter pizza i vardagsrummet, framför tv:n.
translations.ro: Mâncăm pizza în sufragerie, în fața televizorului.
translations.cs: Jíme pizzu v obýváku, před televizí.
translations.da: Vi spiser pizza i stuen, foran tv'en.
translations.ja: 私たちはリビングでテレビの前でピザを食べています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; clausal subject.
Finite verb; 1st person plural present; main verb of the clause.
Common noun; feminine; direct object (accusative) of 'essen'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; neuter; object of the preposition 'im' (dative); location.
Preposition; governs dative in static location; introduces 'vor dem Fernseher'.
Definite article; dative masculine singular; determiner for 'Fernseher'.
Common noun; masculine; object of the preposition 'vor' (dative).

sentences.target: Meine Katze schläft im Wohnzimmer auf dem Sofa.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈkat͡sə ʃlɛːft ɪm ˈvoːnˌtsɪmɐ aʊ̯f deːm ˈzoːfa/

translations.de: Meine Katze schläft im Wohnzimmer auf dem Sofa.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈkat͡sə ʃlɛːft ɪm ˈvoːnˌtsɪmɐ aʊ̯f deːm ˈzoːfa/
translations.en: My cat sleeps in the living room on the sofa.
translations.es: Mi gato duerme en la sala, en el sofá.
translations.fr: Mon chat dort sur le canapé du salon.
translations.it: Il mio gatto dorme sul divano in soggiorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的猫在客厅的沙发上睡觉。
translations.yue: 我隻貓喺客廳張梳化上瞓覺。
translations.ru: Моя кошка спит в гостиной на диване.
translations.pt: Meu gato dorme no sofá da sala.
translations.he: החתול שלי ישן על הספה בסלון.
translations.vi: Con mèo của tôi ngủ trên ghế sofa trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: قطتي تنام على الأريكة في غرفة الجلوس.
translations.nl: Mijn kat slaapt op de bank in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Мій кіт спить у вітальні на дивані.
translations.hu: A macskám a nappaliban a kanapén alszik.
translations.hi: मेरी बिल्ली लिविंग रूम में सोफ़े पर सोती है.
translations.pl: Mój kot śpi na kanapie w salonie.
translations.el: Η γάτα μου κοιμάται στον καναπέ στο σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Katten min sover på sofaen i stua.
translations.id: Kucingku tidur di sofa ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Min katt sover på soffan i vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Pisica mea doarme pe canapea în sufragerie.
translations.cs: Moje kočka spí v obýváku na gauči.
translations.da: Min kat sover på sofaen i stuen.
translations.ja: うちの猫はリビングのソファで寝ています。

es: Hoy voy a recoger la sala rápido.
La sala es pequeña y acogedora.
Estamos comiendo pizza en la sala, frente al televisor.
Mi gato duerme en la sala, en el sofá.

Le salon est petit et chaleureux.
On mange une pizza dans le salon, devant la télé.
Mon chat dort sur le canapé du salon.
it: Oggi metto a posto il soggiorno in fretta.
Il soggiorno è piccolo e accogliente.
Stiamo mangiando la pizza in soggiorno, davanti alla TV.
Il mio gatto dorme sul divano in soggiorno.

我们在客厅里对着电视吃披萨。
